title: Panzer Dragoon Saga
prompt:
Create an original editorial illustration for a retro video game database entry.

Game metadata:
- Title: Panzer Dragoon Saga
- Platform: Sega Saturn
- Release year: 1998
- Genre: Action-RPG, Fantasy
- Mood: epic, melancholic, legendary
- Setting: horizon, monument, sacred sky
- Key objects: crystal, banner, ancient map, sword

Visual goal:
- Represent the game's atmosphere, genre, and collectible identity
- Produce a unique, original image suitable for a premium database card
- The image must feel iconic, readable, and emotionally evocative

Composition:
- Environment-first framing with one key landmark or object, depth layers, and a quiet overlay-safe zone
- Designed for use in a GameDetail header / hero illustration

Style system:
- Use the visual language associated with mature arcade illustration, strange and elegant mood, sharper contrast, premium collector framing
- Apply the RetroDex art direction: premium collectible editorial art, readable, elegant, atmospheric

Strict legal and safety constraints:
- Do NOT reproduce any official character, logo, box art, UI, screenshot, or sprite
- Do NOT imitate exact copyrighted visual designs
- Do NOT include any trademarked logo or title text inside the image
- Evoke only the atmosphere, archetypes, objects, and genre cues
- The result must be fully original and non-infringing in appearance

Output:
- High detail
- Premium editorial game-card illustration
- No text
- No watermark
- Clean readable lighting
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to panzer dragoon, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text
legal_notes: Risk level medium; use atmosphere, objects, and environments only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
